form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently favourite; won by 1.5 len at this track March 31 over 1400m defeating Havaci carrying 60.5kg at $1.45. Before that favourite; scored a big 3 len win at Yesiloba March 22 over 1900m defeating After Burner with 58kg at $1.70. Has the right credentials.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 40 day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 0.8 len at this track March 3 over 1300m defeating Dolce Mare carrying 54kg at $2.20. The run before that favourite; ran on from midfield and scored a big 3 len win at this track February 17 over 1400m defeating Whisper Of Victory carrying 54kg at $1.70. Likely to play a big role.
